title: AI UX Foundation — Design System, Terminology & Shared Components
description: Establish consistent AI visual language before polishing individual surfaces. Fixes cross-cutting confusion: fit vs match score, Sparkles overload, split quota displays, and missing shared patterns. All new components use designTokens.js and existing shadcn/ui primitives.

userStories.title: Standardize AI terminology across the app
userStories.description: Create frontend/src/lib/aiConstants.js with canonical copy. FIT_SCORE_LABEL everywhere. Replace user-visible Match score. Rename StatsBar Needs follow-up to Stale applications.
userStories.notes: aiConstants.js; Fit score label; Stale applications in StatsBar

userStories.title: Shared AiSection shell component
userStories.description: Create AiSection.jsx wrapper using CARD_BASE, brand left border, icon circle header. Refactor at least 3 AI sections to use it.
userStories.notes: AiSection.jsx; ResumeInsights, FollowUpDraft, FitScore sections refactored

userStories.title: Unified AI usage indicator in Settings
userStories.description: Single Settings AI usage dashboard. Remove duplicate quota from Resume section. Shared AI_LIMIT_MESSAGE for 429 toasts.
userStories.notes: SettingsUsageSection AI dashboard; getAiToastError in AI sections

userStories.title: AI iconography guide
userStories.description: AI_ICONS map in aiConstants.js. JobRecommendations uses TrendingUp not Sparkles. InterviewPrep idle uses BookOpen.
userStories.notes: TrendingUp in JobRecommendations; BookOpen in InterviewPrep idle header
